name: standards fetcher: standards/fetchers/html-anchor.sh extracts content by HTML anchor id (e.g. #5-2-types) per identifier_pattern
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/fetchers/html-anchor.sh" --in "$PWD/page.html" --anchor 5-2-types 2>out.txt && grep "Type-related" out.txt 1>&2 && ! grep "Other content" out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
setup:
printf '

Types section

Type-related content

Other

Other content

' > page.html
